evidence_quotes.quote: so that they can own and use the video game even after the publishers are no longer interested in maintaining it
the publishers of video games should provide ways/instructions of how to use the video game after they are no longer involved in maintaining it

paragraphs.text: Hello, I would like the Digital Fairness Act to provide protections for people who buy video games, so that they can own and use the video game even after the publishers are no longer interested in maintaining the video game, the publishers of video games should provide ways/instructions of how to use the video game after they are no longer involved in maintaining it, since the people have bought it they should own it just like when one buys a chair they own it and use it for the rest of their lives. Thanks!
